phrases.intent_en: Ask about opening hours and ticket price
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les horaires et le tarif d'entrée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son layz oh-REHR ay luh tah-REEF dahn-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: The château houses the city history museum. Hours and prices vary by season.

responses.english: Hours and prices are posted at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: layz oh-REHR ay tah-REEF son ah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.local: Les horaires et tarifs sont affichés à l'entrée.

phrases.text_local: Quel musée se trouve à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel myoo-ZAY suh TROOV ah lan-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée d'Histoire de Saint-Malo traces the city's history from its founding to the present, including the corsair era and World War II.

responses.phonetic: wee, say tah lay-TAZH, dahn lay sal doo oh
responses.local: Le Musée d'Histoire de la ville, à l'intérieur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view from the castle towers
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la vue depuis les tours du château ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah VYOO duh-PWEE lay toor doo shah-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: You can climb the castle towers for panoramic views of the walled city, harbor, and Channel Islands on clear days.

responses.english: Panoramic view of the city, port, and sea.
responses.local: Vue panoramique sur la ville, le port et la mer.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is wheelchair access
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un accès pour les fauteuils roulants ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn ak-SAY poor lay foh-TOY roo-LAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Historic buildings in France sometimes have limited accessibility. Ask at the entrance.

responses.english: The ground floor is accessible. For the upper floors, it's difficult.
responses.phonetic: luh ray-duh-shoh-SAY eh ahk-seh-SEEBL. poor layz ay-TAHZH, say dee-fee-SEEL
responses.local: Le rez-de-chaussée est accessible. Pour les étages, c'est difficile.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the rampart walk from here
phrases.text_local: Comment accéder aux remparts depuis le château ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ak-say-DAY oh rahn-PAR duh-PWEE luh shah-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: The rampart walk starts near the château and offers views of the sea and the old town.

responses.english: Go out and take the stairs to the left, right away.
responses.phonetic: sor-TAY ay pruh-NAY less-kah-LYAY ah GOHSH, too duh SWEET
responses.local: Sortez et prenez l'escalier à gauche, tout de suite.
